feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: UK Postponed Import VAT Accounting in SAP
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

I am looking for guidance from anyone with UK VAT / HMRC experience in SAP, specifically regarding the correct accounting treatment for monthly Postponed Import VAT (PIVA).

Background:
Each month our customer receive a postponed import VAT statement from HMRC. In the previous system, they could simply upload the statement into the VAT return module and manually enter the figures. The system automatically created the necessary contra postings between input VAT and output VAT.

In SAP, however, this process does not appear to be straightforward.

What we are trying to achieve:
We need to post a VAT-only document that correctly updates both:

  • Input VAT G/L account
  • Output VAT G/L account

without impacting supplier balances or net expense values.

What we have researched so far:
One suggested approach was to create a VAT-only supplier invoice using a VF tax code (or similar configuration involving tax-only postings / reverse charge logic).

We tested this in our SAP test system, but we are encountering configuration-related errors when attempting multiple assignment lines for the tax code. It appears SAP may require additional tax code configuration to allow this process.

Questions:

  1. How are UK companies typically handling postponed import VAT accounting in SAP?
  2. Is there a standard SAP process for HMRC PIVA postings?

Thank you very much in advance for any guidance.

Best regards

Vanessa

#SAP #SAPFI #UKVAT #PostponedImportVAT #S4HANA #DRC

entry.title: Invalid namespace for Basic material
entry.content:
Hello,

we are experiencing an issue with Invalid namespace for Basic material:

In customizing activity 103908 Define Basic Materials we can not set up all necessary entries because of the limitation:


Message no. /CFG/CF_SSC_FRW031

Diagnosis

As per cloud framework guideline, a customer record cannot be created with SAP reserved pattern. This restriction is implemented to protect the customer data because if same records are delivered by SAP in futurereleases then customer created records will be overwritten.

Namespace restriction is applied on the key fields of an application.

Customers cannot create records starting with below mentioned SAP Best practice content namespace restrictions.

SAP reserved character fields - S, Q, R, X, P, Y

SAP reserved numeric fields - 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 0

Reference: 2326112 - Namespace restriction in SSCUI - SAP for Me

 

Does anybody else experience this issue? Have you found a suitable workaround?

 

Best regards,

Kerisha

entry.title: Is it Possible To Create Work Flow For Business Partner Create/Change In SAP S/4 Cloud Public Editon
entry.content:
Hello Community,

As SAP provided standard workflows related to Sales Order, pricing and all but not able to find the workflow if Business Partner Creation or Change in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Any workaround or solution to make this happen in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Your thoughts and suggestion are greatly appreciated.

 

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Select the production version for the subcontract purchase order
entry.content:
For current outsourced purchase orders, the BOM can only be retrieved from the default version of the purchase information record. Is it possible to not maintain the version of the purchase information record and instead manually select the production version when creating the purchase order?


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

ME21N  ME13

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Weighbridge Integration
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We need to integrate the weight captured from the weighbridge scale into a custom field, either within the standard Delivery screen or in the Freight Order / Freight Booking document. Could you please confirm whether it is possible to integrate the weighbridge directly with the standard SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud screen, or if a custom application on SAP BTP is required for this integration?

entry.title: Request for New Depreciation Key Configuration – WDV Method
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have a requirement to configure a new depreciation key based on the WDV (Written Down Value) method for our client.Please find the attached workings for your reference. Kindly review and let us know the necessary configurations, inputs, or actions required from our side to proceed further.Please advise on the next steps.

entry.title: S4 Hana Cloud AP & FICA open items netting
entry.content:
Hi team,

Standard netting functionality is not working between Accounts Payable (AP) and FICA open items due to the design of FICA, where open items are transferred to the General Ledger during each posting run. As a result, direct reconciliation or automatic clearing between customer and supplier balances at the Business Partner level is not possible. This limitation impacts the ability to offset receivables and payables, requiring manual intervention. Clarification is needed from SAP on whether any standard solution, configuration, or recommended approach exists to enable or improve reconciliation between AP and FICA balances.

entry.title: Group Reporting - Two Tenants with different FYV (4-4-5 and K4)
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

A customer operates only in the US and has two different lines of business: Retail and Real Estate.

The customer initially requested to use Fiscal Year Variant K4 in the leading ledger and SZ (4-4-5) in the non-leading ledger. However, we understand that this scenario is currently not supported because industry-specific fiscal year variants cannot be used as alternative fiscal year variants.

The customer understands this restriction and would like to know if it would be possible to implement two separate systems - one for the companies using FYV K4 and another for those using FYV SZ.

My questions are:

  • In relation to Group Reporting functionality, is there a way to map or consolidate two different fiscal year variants that do not share the same start and end dates?

entry.title: Credit Management for Professional Services Project Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, specifically with Professional Services / Customer Projects and the Project Billing process.

Our business requirement is to use Credit Management to prevent project billing when a customer has an outstanding or overdue balance above a certain threshold.

For example:

Scenario 1:
A customer has overdue open items greater than EUR 20,000. When the billing specialist tries to create or process a Project Billing Request in Manage Project Billing, the system should prevent the billing from moving forward.

Scenario 2:
A customer has exceeded their credit limit. Before generating the Billing Document Request or final invoice for a customer project, the system should either block the process or require approval from Credit/Finance.

I found the configuration activity “Activate Credit Management in Service Transactions”. However, these seem to be related to Service Management objects, not directly to Professional Services Customer Projects or Project Billing Requests.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/adbae5bcd5994f159bf2847a11397b61/2f7ce9927b424492b5e3e25656e8bfca.html?locale=en-US

My questions are:

Is there any standard way in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to activate Credit Management checks for Professional Services Project Billing?
Can Credit Management automatically block the creation of a Project Billing Request, Billing Document Request, or invoice when the customer exceeds a credit limit or overdue amount?

Any guidance, documentation reference, or experience from similar implementations would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Cost Element Group Values - Public Cloud CDS
entry.content:
Hi, 

Hello, our client is operating on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition. They require a report that displays cost elements which do not belong to any cost element group . We plan to maintain these cost element groups via the 'Manage Global Hierarchies' application. Could you please let us know if there is an available CDS view or API—comparable to SETLEAF or G_SET_SEARCH_FOR_INTERVAL?

entry.title: Down payment in extended intercompany process 5D2 to the customer and within the company
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud, is it possible to define a billing plan in the sales order for the end customer within the extended intercompany process (Scope Item 5D2) that is carried over to the automatically generated internal sales order and can also be adapted there?

If not, what is the best way to handle this if I want to store a billing plan in the sales order to the end customer but also need a down payment from the other company code for internal settlement? Is there a way to handle this through Finance?

entry.title: User Consumption Report for Particular Time Period
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to get a report of user login consumption for a particular time period.

Example: In a month, how many hours the user has logged in. 

How to get this report?

 

Thanks. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Not able to upload document in PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have an option to attach document in manage sales order or create sales order, only links are supported. How to achieve this? What are alternatives? 

Thanks,
Uday.

entry.title: Company address cannot be displayed fully in Vietnam Financial Statements after release 2602
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with the company address displayed in the Vietnam Financial Statements after the 2602 release.

Before release 2602, the header of the Balance Sheet and Income Statement could display the full company address correctly.

However, after the 2602 release, the government circular format was updated and the header became longer. Because of this, the company address is now truncated and cannot be displayed fully. I already tried shortening the address, but it was not effective.

Is there any way to display the company address in two lines without customizing the PDF form?

I have attached screenshots before and after the release for reference:

Before: with fully Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam

After: using “HCM” instead of “Ho Chi Minh City”), but the issue still remains, only “Viet” is displayed while “Nam” is truncated.

entry.title: Why is Process Free Form Payments (F2564) called "Online Payment Flow" in Signavio? What specific bu
entry.content:
Hi community,
I'm working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation project and reviewing the standard Signavio process flows. I found a process flow named "Online Payment Flow" (J60) which consists of the following steps using App F2564:

Free Form Payment Request
Post Free Form Payment Request
Process Free Form Payment

I understand the technical functionality of F2564 (creating payment requests for unregistered suppliers, customers, or direct G/L account payments), but I have two questions:
1. Why is it called "Online Payment Flow"?
What does "online" specifically mean in this context? Is it:

Real-time processing vs. batch processing?
Browser-based Fiori UI vs. SAP GUI?
Immediate payment execution without going through the standard AP process (supplier master → invoice entry → payment program)?

2. What are the typical business scenarios where this flow should be used?
In a standard implementation, when would you recommend using Free Form Payments instead of the regular AP process (MIRO/FB60 → F110)?
For example:

One-time vendor payments (non-recurring suppliers)?
Employee reimbursements?
Tax payments or government fees?
Emergency/urgent payments?
Refunds to customers?

I want to understand the intended use cases so I can properly explain this flow to my client during the Fit-to-Standard workshops.
Any insights would be greatly appreciated!
Best regards

entry.title: How to check connection between sales order item category and documents generated in CBC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In SAP Public Cloud, there are some item categories in sales order that will generate relevant documents.

Example:
- Item category CB1 will generate purchase requisition
- Item category TAD will generate solution order

I would like to know how to check which item categories will generate which type of documents. I checked in CBC but found none.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD Sales 
I really appreciate.
Best regards.

entry.title: Restrict Maintenance Notification conversion to only Reactive Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
We are trying to restrict Maintenance Notification conversion to only Reactive Maintenance Orders in the Manage Maintenance Notifications app.

We identified that the restriction field AUFART (Order Type) is available in business catalog SAP_EAM_BC_MN_MNG_PC (via fields like AUFART_IWERK, AUFART_WERKS, etc.). However, these same restriction fields are also used in catalog SAP_EAM_BC_MP_ORD_MNG_PC, which is responsible for maintenance order creation.

Our concern is that restricting AUFART at the catalog level would remove order type options not only during notification conversion but also in the “Create Maintenance Order” app, leading to unintended cross-app impacts.

Could you please advise on the best approach in S/4HANA Public Cloud to restrict notification-to-order conversion specifically to Reactive Maintenance, without affecting direct order creation or other apps?

entry.title: Post valuation for real estate contract on multiple ledgers
entry.content:
When I post valuation for a real estate contract it only post against one ledger. Either on the one maintained in the valuation rule or determining ledger from accounting principle (if not maintained in rule) How can the system post valuation on all ledgers without assining multiple rules in the contract?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to schedule Monthly Physical Inventory Creation for CC Indicator 'A' only in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation and looking for a way to automate the creation of Physical Inventory Documents specifically for materials marked with Cycle Counting (CC) Indicator "A" (Monthly).

Current Scenario: We have categorized our materials into A, B, and C indicators. We want the system to automatically generate the PI documents for 'A' items on a monthly basis without manually selecting them each time, and business don't want documents getting created automatically for "B" &"C" indicator.

What I’ve Tried:

I am using the Schedule Physical Inventory Document Creation app.

I can see the job template for "Cycle Counting," but I am struggling to isolate the job, so it strictly runs for materials due under Indicator 'A' on a specific monthly frequency.

Any guidance on the configuration or job scheduling setup would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: ISO 4217 currency codes for precious metals XAU, XAG, XPT, and XPD required.
entry.content: We require support regarding ISO 4217 currency codes for precious metals such as XAU, XAG, XPT, and XPD.
